title: Egyptian Fried Rice with Fried Egg
description: A simple and flavorful dish combining Egyptian spices with the comfort of fried rice and a fried egg. Serve hot for a satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the Egyptian spice to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Add the fried rice to the skillet and stir to combine with the spice.
Push the rice to one side of the skillet.
Crack an egg into the other side of the skillet and scramble until cooked through.
Mix the egg with the rice.
Add the mustardy to the skillet and stir to combine.
